products.name: Cortex
products.descriptor: NVIDIA-based edge AI video processing board for multi-feed ISR

evidence.snippet:
**Data Exploitation at the Edge**
Designed for 1-2 video feeds running multiple AI algorithms in near real time.
Suited for airborne, ground, and submersible applications, directly connected to a sensor or acting as a C4I node on a larger network.
Makes use of our proprietary neural network architecture to run our vision inference engine.
Supports Wi-Fi, USB, and Ethernet.
[Cortex v1.8 Datasheet](https://sightlineintelligence.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Cortex-v1.8-Datasheet.pdf)

products.name: 41xx-OEM
products.descriptor: Qualcomm QCS7230-based OEM video processor family for SWaP-constrained ISR integration

evidence.snippet:
Remarkably compact with low SWaP, the 4100-OEM prioritizes efficiency while delivering uncompromised performance. Offering flexible options for OEM and SOM integration, the 4100-OEM has customizable and scalable solutions to meet your specific requirements.
Multiple digital video inputs – HD input, multiple camera interfaces (see Camera Compatibility Guide).

Processing power – Built on the Qualcomm QCS7230 processor
Low Swap – 50.5mm x 38.1mm x 16.5mm (2.0in x 1.5in x 0.65in), 5W.

products.name: 4100 SOM
products.descriptor: System-on-Module variant of the 4100-OEM for customer-designed interface board integration

evidence.snippet: 4100 OEM and 4100 SOM

Remarkably compact with low SWaP, the 4100-OEM prioritizes efficiency while delivering uncompromised performance. Offering flexible options for OEM and SOM integration, the 4100-OEM has customizable and scalable solutions to meet your specific requirements.

products.name: 17xx-OEM
products.descriptor: NXP ARM-based ultra-low-SWaP OEM video processor family (1710 and 1750 models)

evidence.snippet:
Ultra-low-SWAP for use in the smallest systems:
1710 – Smallest footprint – 1.11 x 1.5 x 0.5 in (28.2 x 38.1 x 11.6 mm) 14.7g (SOM only 7.1g)
1750 – 1.3 x 1.8 x 0.5 in (33.3 x 45.0 x 11.6 mm) 16.9g (SOM only 7.1g)

Video outputs: H.264/H.265 IP-streamed encoded (multiple streams), Camera Link, HDMI, and HD-SDI.
NXP multi-core ARM-based.

products.name: 1710-OEM
products.descriptor: Smallest-footprint NXP-based OEM video processor, 28.2 × 38.1 × 11.6 mm, 14.7 g

evidence.snippet: 1710 – Smallest footprint – 1.11 x 1.5 x 0.5 in (28.2 x 38.1 x 11.6 mm) 14.7g (SOM only 7.1g)

Designed to enhance even the smallest camera systems, these compact OEM onboard video processors deliver significant performance improvements over the previous generation. Multiple configuration options and a range of compatible input accessory boards support flexible integration.
Full feature SW single-channel processing, limited feature SW dual-channel processing.

products.name: 1750-OEM
products.descriptor: NXP-based OEM video processor, 33.3 × 45.0 × 11.6 mm, 16.9 g, with SOM option

evidence.snippet:
Designed to enhance even the smallest camera systems, these compact OEM onboard video processors deliver significant performance improvements over the previous generation. Multiple configuration options and a range of compatible input accessory boards support flexible integration.
Full feature SW single-channel processing, limited feature SW dual-channel processing.

products.name: 1700-SOM
products.descriptor: System-on-Module core of the 17xx-OEM platform for size-optimized customer board integration

evidence.snippet: The 1700-SOM, the key component of the 17xx-OEM platform, allows size-optimized integration onto customer-designed interface boards. The COTS System on Module (SOM) and OEM reference design support are provided to help customers integrate the SOM option.

products.name: Software Solutions
products.descriptor: Sightline Intelligence edge AI video processing software platform for defense ISR

evidence.snippet:
*   [Software](https://sightlineintelligence.com/software/)
        *   [Software Solutions](https://sightlineintelligence.com/software-solutions/)

Sightline Intelligence delivers real-time AI video processing and target recognition directly at the edge, eliminating cloud dependency and latency risk. Our ultra–low SWaP embedded systems power millisecond ISR intelligence for autonomous aircraft, tactical teams, and mission-critical defense platforms worldwide.

Interface & Accessories pages (System Interfaces, Camera Interfaces, Video Output Accessory Boards) were skipped_out_of_scope — no SKU-level detail on specific board models or compatibility.
